channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Inflation hits near 3-year high, Fed's preferred gauge shows
item.description: Inflation rose for the second straight month as the Iran war pushed up gas prices.

item.title: Treasury considers $250 bill featuring Trump's image
item.description: The department said it is preparing for the banknote in response to last year's proposed legislation.

item.title: About 8% of US lacked health insurance in 2025, data shows; rate may rise next year
How ChatGPT warped reality for some users: 'Why would the AI lie to me?'
item.description: AI-fueled delusions can occur when chatbots affirm grandiose or paranoid ideas.
